notes: Live order-edit quantity validation capture against one disposable order-edit session. The precondition order and variant are resolved via real cold OrdersOrderEditHydrate + OrdersDraftOrderVariantHydrate forwards (the two upstreamCalls) rather than a seed/setup block. Rejected quantity branches must not mutate the open calculated order; the final valid addVariant payload proves read-after-reject state.
